The '''''Slave IV''''' was an [[Amphibious Interstellar Assault Transport/infantry|AIAT/i]] [[Gunship/Legends|gunship]] produced by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] that was used by [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] to replace the ''[[Slave III]]''. Coincidentally, it was of the same ship class as ''[[Jaster's Legacy]]'', the original vessel of Boba's father, [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==History==
[[File:Jasterslegacy_negvv.png|thumb|left|150px|An [[Amphibious Interstellar Assault Transport/infantry|AIAT/i]].]]
The ''Slave IV'' assisted Fett on his many escapades through [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. For instance: He used the ship to track down a [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] named [[Kardue'sai'Malloc/Legends|Kardue'sai'Malloc]] on [[Peppel]] who was wanted on [[Devaron/Legends|Devaron]] for his crimes.

For reasons unknown, Fett abandoned the starship on the planet [[Shogun (planet)|Shogun]] in [[21 ABY/Legends|21 ABY]]<ref name="GaW">''[[Galaxy at War]]''</ref> following the death of his friend [[Fenn Shysa]]. It was later rediscovered by [[Ailyn Vel]], Boba's daughter, while searching for her father who she believed to be dead. She then used it to track down [[Bornan Thul]] in response to a bounty placed on him by [[Nolaa Tarkona]].
